stemHtml: Which of the following is the correct definition of "commercial air transport operation" according to ICAO Annex 6, Part I?

options.a: Any aircraft operation for remuneration or hire.
options.b: An aircraft operation involving the transport of passengers, cargo or mail for remuneration or hire.
options.c: An aircraft operation in which an aircraft is used for specialised services such as agriculture, construction, photography, surveying, observation and patrol, search and rescue, aerial advertisement, etc.
options.d: An aircraft operation by a commercial operator for or without remuneration or hire.
